template:
**DOCUMENT FORMAT — CONTRACT/AGREEMENT**:
Formal legal agreement between parties.

STRUCTURE:
1. TITLE: Descriptive title (e.g., "SERVICE AGREEMENT", "EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT")
2. PREAMBLE: Date, parties with full legal names and addresses, recitals
3. DEFINITIONS: Key terms used throughout
4. SCOPE OF SERVICES/OBLIGATIONS: Detailed description of what each party must do
5. COMPENSATION/PAYMENT: Amount, schedule, method, late payment terms
6. TERM AND TERMINATION: Effective date, duration, renewal, termination triggers, notice period
7. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES: What each party guarantees
8. INDEMNIFICATION: Who bears liability for what
9. CONFIDENTIALITY: Protection of proprietary information (if not covered by separate NDA)
10. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: Caps, exclusions of consequential damages
11. DISPUTE RESOLUTION: Mediation, arbitration, or litigation; governing law; venue
12. GENERAL PROVISIONS: Notices, assignment, entire agreement, amendments, severability, force majeure, waiver
13. SIGNATURE BLOCKS: Lines for all parties

FORMAT: Numbered sections with lettered subsections. Formal contract language.
hints: Key elements to address: parties and roles, scope of services/obligations, payment terms, term and termination, representations and warranties, indemnification, dispute resolution.
